text:
(1) The Department shall:

(a) Administer and enforce the provisions of this chapter.

(b) Provide for hearings upon request of persons aggrieved by orders or acts of the Department under the provisions of NRS 485.185 to 485.300 , inclusive.

(2) The Department may adopt regulations necessary for the administration of this chapter.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.130 — General duties of Department.

(1) The Department shall:

    (a) Administer and enforce the provisions of this chapter.

    (b) Provide for hearings upon request of persons aggrieved by orders or acts of the Department under the provisions of NRS 485.185 to 485.300 , inclusive.

(2) The Department may adopt regulations necessary for the administration of this chapter.

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Administer and enforce the provisions of this chapter.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Provide for hearings upon request of persons aggrieved by orders or acts of the Department under the provisions of NRS 485.185 to 485.300 , inclusive.
The Department may adopt regulations necessary for the administration of this chapter.
